'''''Stellar Manx''''' was an [[Action VI bulk transport/Legends|Action VI bulk transport]] captained by [[Kar Lamoran]]. In [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]], it was [[Mission to Kwenn Space Station|commandeered]] by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] for a top-secret experiment.

{{Ship-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars Missions 18: Rogue Squadron to the Rescue]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Star Wars Missions 19: Bounty on Bonadan]]''
*''[[Star Wars Missions 20: Total Destruction]]''
